response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 00:00-04:13 is dialogue-based merchandise promotion. 04:13-04:59 is a singing performance. 2. Performed OCR at 04:32 to identify the song title "心の坂道" and credits "Lyrics: TATSU, SHINGO", "Music: SHINGO". 3. Identified the song "Kokoro no Sakamichi" as a popular sign language song originally by HANDSIGN. 4. Performed the search: `"心の坂道" HANDSIGN Japanese and English lyrics`. 5. Confirmed "Kokoro no Sakamichi" is a cover performed by Airani Iofifteen. 6. Set lyric fields to `null` because a definitive, complete official lyric transcript was not fully present in the search result snippets.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for Airani Iofifteen's 2025 birthday merchandise. The video consists of an extended segment where the character introduces and describes various birthday set items, followed by a musical performance of her cover of the song "Kokoro no Sakamichi" by HANDSIGN.

scenes.description: Airani Iofifteen presents and describes her 2025 birthday merchandise set, including a blanket, pillow cover, acrylic clock, and voice pack.
Airani Iofifteen performs a cover of the song "Kokoro no Sakamichi". The title and credits appear on-screen.
